title: BetterTooltip
description: Makes the Hover Tooltip Transparent and more simple.
body:
# **BetterTooltip is deprecated after 1.21.1!**
Please check out one of the following alternatives:
- [Simple Tooltip (Split Monochrome Background/Frame)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip_simple+split-mono-bg-frame)
- [Dark Gray Tooltip (Monochrome)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip_darkgray+mono-full)
- [White Tooltip (Frame-only Monochrome)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltip_white+mono-frame)
- **or if you'd like a bit more (color) variation: [Any listed here](https://modrinth.com/organization/pride-tooltips).**

## Old Description (1.21.1 and below)
Uses Core Shaders to make the Minecraft Hover Tooltip Black and Transparent with a light Gray Border.
See the Gallery for more images.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LWm4CU6h/images/6012354abd21e90f856566bf4ed43e51b7bff912.png)
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LWm4CU6h/images/ac3439a98d69fb32471ac2f3ea18ce5b9e6de6ec.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LWm4CU6h/images/15e3ced2b9370d2fd727ef4c89ec4f002063c10a.png)
